body:
Replaces the hardcoded `digital-garden-template.vercel.app` (a Vercel project that never existed) with `digital-garden.sepo.site` in `quartz.config.yaml` and the `quartz.ts` fallback — the two spots that bake absolute URLs into sitemap/RSS/og-image output. The alias already resolves (Sepo-gated).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KSJ1viQV4pp3hcWo9u5oPV
title: Point baseUrl at digital-garden.sepo.site
